title: crotalaria adenocarpoides
intro: Crotalaria adenocarpoides is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria adenocarpoides include treating worm infections, reducing inflammation, and preventing bacterial infections, making it a valuable plant in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria adenocarpoides often involve drying and crushing the leaves or roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
